mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refund_record(refund_reason, quantity, refund_amount, stock_action, order_id, dish_id) VALUES(#{refundReason}, #{quantity}, #{refundAmount}, #{stockAction}, #{orderId}, #{dishId})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, d.dish_name FROM refund_record r LEFT JOIN dish d ON r.dish_id = d.dish_id ORDER BY r.refund_id DESC
SELECT r.*, d.dish_name FROM refund_record r LEFT JOIN dish d ON r.dish_id = d.dish_id ORDER BY r.refund_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT refund_reason AS reason, COUNT(*) AS count, IFNULL(SUM(refund_amount), 0) AS amount FROM refund_record GROUP BY refund_reason ORDER BY count DESC
